bio.description: A short description about the user.

photoUrl.description: URL to the user's profile picture.

bannerUrl.description: URL to the user's account banner.

studentType.description: The educational level of the user.

useAi.description: Whether the user wants to enable generative AI features.

focus.description: The primary tool the user wants to focus on.

Course.title: Course
Course.description: Represents an academic course or subject, used to categorize flashcard sets, tasks, and notes.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Course entity.

name.description: The name of the course or subject (e.g., 'Calculus I', 'World History').

description.description: An optional detailed description of the course or subject.

FlashcardSet.title: FlashcardSet
FlashcardSet.description: A collection of related flashcards, often grouped by topic or course.

id.description: Unique identifier for the FlashcardSet entity.

name.description: The title or name of the flashcard set (e.g., 'Chapter 5 Vocabulary', 'Midterm Review').

description.description: An optional detailed description of the flashcard set.

courseId.description: Reference to the Course this flashcard set belongs to. (Relationship: Course 1:N FlashcardSet)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the flashcard set was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the flashcard set was last updated.

Flashcard.title: Flashcard
Flashcard.description: An individual flashcard containing a question and an answer, part of a flashcard set.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Flashcard entity.

flashcardSetId.description: Reference to the FlashcardSet this flashcard belongs to. (Relationship: FlashcardSet 1:N Flashcard)

question.description: The question or prompt displayed on the flashcard.

answer.description: The answer or response to the flashcard's question.

imageUrl.description: Optional URL to an image associated with the front of the flashcard.

answerImageUrl.description: Optional URL to an image associated with the back of the flashcard.

lastReviewedAt.description: Timestamp of the last time this flashcard was reviewed.

reviewCount.description: The total number of times this flashcard has been reviewed.

easeFactor.description: A factor indicating the perceived difficulty or ease of remembering the card.

nextReviewAt.description: The calculated timestamp when this flashcard is scheduled for its next review session.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the flashcard was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the flashcard was last updated.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns this course.

params.name: courseId
params.description: The unique identifier for the specific course.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns this flashcard set.

params.name: courseId
params.description: The unique identifier of the course this flashcard set belongs to.

params.name: flashcardSetId
params.description: The unique identifier for the specific flashcard set.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns this flashcard.

params.name: courseId
params.description: The unique identifier of the course the parent flashcard set belongs to.

params.name: flashcardSetId
params.description: The unique identifier of the flashcard set this flashcard belongs to.

params.name: flashcardId
params.description: The unique identifier for the specific flashcard.

firestore.reasoning: Standard hierarchical structure for user isolation and easy security rules.
